# source: https://github.com/SuLvXiangXin/zipnerf-pytorch/issues/83
# repo: SuLvXiangXin/zipnerf-pytorch
# title: ValueError: surface level must be within volume data range. 
# 
# I've been trying to use the mesh extraction operation from this library, but I'm constantly getting the error above. I've used the example data and pretrained weights. 
# Here's the console output: 
# When I attempted to running the training process myself first, I got an MemoryError and after adjusting the number of workers from 8 to 4 it crashed with "ValueError: The histogram is empty, please file a bug report.".
# MemoryError:
# ```
# PS C:\Users\Administrator\Documents\zipnerf-pytorch> python train.py --gin_configs=configs/360.gin --gin_bindings="Config.data_dir = 'C:/Users/Administrator/Documents/zipnerf-pytorch/data/360_v2/bicycle'" --gin_bindings="Config.exp_name = 'C:/Users/Administrator/Documents/zipnerf-pytorch/360_v2/bicycle'" --gin_bindings="Config.factor = 4" --gin_bindi
